title: Force Normal Font
description: Replaces the unicode font with the normal Minecraft font in places where it may be forced (eg Patchouli books)
body:
Replaces Minecraft's Unicode font with the standard font seen throughout the game. This doesn't do much in vanilla Minecraft, however modded reference textbooks (especially those reliant on Patchouli) have a tendency to use the Unicode font in place of the normal one. This pack replaces that, and also enables custom fonts to be used in these places as well.

Note: In some cases, the change of font may cause text to overflow where it's supposed to show up. This isn't a fault of this pack, the vanilla font is a fair bit wider than the Unicode font and mod authors can't account for the change. See the Gallery for an example.

Functional versions exist for 1.19.2 and 1.20.1. Will probably work on other versions, but make sure to download whichever of those two is closer to your target version.
